description_long: This house features a rectangular, two-story structure with a prominent gable roof covered in reddish-brown tiles. The exterior walls are finished in a smooth, light-colored material, likely stucco or painted concrete. The front facade displays a symmetrical arrangement of windows and a central doorway, with the lower level slightly recessed to form a small entry area. The rear of the house includes a walled courtyard or patio, partially enclosed and accessible from the main building. The roof overhangs the walls, providing shade and architectural interest. The overall design is simple and functional, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on geometric forms.
description: A two-story house with a gable tile roof, light-colored walls, symmetrical windows, and a small walled courtyard at the rear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the sloped gable roof and the walled courtyard extending from the main structure.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the symmetrical window arrangement and central entryway on the ground floor.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the gable roof and courtyard, with clear visibility of the roof's overhang.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the enclosed courtyard area and the back facade with additional windows.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with a recessed doorway, no porch, and minimal decorative elements.
